name: Last Winters
description:
“Please don’t be my last one…”

[ famine. ]

.

Stuck in a famine and a snow storm that’s been going on for many seasons already. Hope should’ve been lost long ago, but Utis still tries his best to cling on. Despite having the choice to join his friends and flee, he does not want to leave his family behind. And by the last winters, he hopes that it will be the last winter of this storm. Or the last one he’ll be alive for.

[Art by: @lxohzr3iNoFEvUS]

Summary:

Utis is a 19 year old wolf that is caught in a famine and a perpetual snow storm. He’s been suffering in the cold ever since he was 15, being the one that’s been left behind. But despite that, he stays hopeful.

may be a hint about a new series idea i was thinking about, but not making atm ^^

I'm still alive, just not very motivated!! (at least one bot per week is all i can do rn -w-)

Hopefully it will get better during the summer.
creator: shokokokok
